# From Batch & Blast to Bespoke: How Care.com Automated Personalization with Iterable & Movable Ink

Webinar

# From Batch & Blast to Bespoke: How Care.com Automated Personalization with Iterable & Movable Ink

June 12, 2024

12:10 pm (PDT) / 3:10 pm (EDT) / 8:10 pm (BST)

20 minutes

## Description

In this joint session with Iterable and Movable Ink, learn how Care.com kept their members engaged by combining Iterable’s flexible and scalable platform with Movable Ink’s next level dynamic personalization capabilities to drive impressive lift in campaign engagement.
